name: linkright
description: LinkRight, a local-first career OS distributed as one plugin: resume tailoring, interview prep, job hunt, LinkedIn content and outreach, portfolio, and a shared career memory every skill reads and writes.

plugins.name: linkright
plugins.description: One install for the whole LinkRight career OS. 16 skills over a shared career memory at ~/.linkright. Built from canonical sources and published to the release branch by build.sh.
